mapper.sql: kdt.id, kdt.year, kdt.kpi_annual_id, kdt.dept_id, kdt.dept_name, kdt.parent_id, kdt.dept_level, kdt.dept_sequence, kdt.sequence, kdt.ext_dept_id, kdt.ext_department_id, kdt.ext_team_id, kdt.admin_job_id, kdt.assessment_department_flag, kdt.assessed_department_flag, kdt.info_work_card, kdt.attribute1, kdt.attribute2, kdt.attribute3, kdt.attribute4, kdt.attribute5, kdt.create_time, kdt.create_by, kdt.update_time, kdt.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.year as ${tAlias}_year, ${tAlias}.kpi_annual_id as ${tAlias}_kpi_annual_id, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.parent_id as ${tAlias}_parent_id, ${tAlias}.dept_level as ${tAlias}_dept_level, ${tAlias}.dept_sequence as ${tAlias}_dept_sequence, ${tAlias}.sequence as ${tAlias}_sequence, ${tAlias}.ext_dept_id as ${tAlias}_ext_dept_id, ${tAlias}.ext_department_id as ${tAlias}_ext_department_id, ${tAlias}.ext_team_id as ${tAlias}_ext_team_id, ${tAlias}.admin_job_id as ${tAlias}_admin_job_id, ${tAlias}.assessment_department_flag as ${tAlias}_assessment_department_flag, ${tAlias}.assessed_department_flag as ${tAlias}_assessed_department_flag, ${tAlias}.info_work_card as ${tAlias}_info_work_card, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into kpi_department_tree (year, kpi_annual_id, dept_id, dept_name, parent_id, dept_level, dept_sequence, sequence, ext_dept_id, ext_department_id, ext_team_id, admin_job_id, assessment_department_flag, assessed_department_flag, info_work_card, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{kpiAnnualId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptSequence,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sequence,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{extDeptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{extDepartmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{extTeamId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{adminJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{assessmentDepartmentFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{assessedDepartmentFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{infoWorkCard,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update kpi_department_tree set year = #{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, kpi_annual_id = #{kpiAnnualId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, dept_level = #{deptLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_sequence = #{deptSequence,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sequence = #{sequence,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ext_dept_id = #{extDeptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ext_department_id = #{extDepartmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ext_team_id = #{extTeamId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, admin_job_id = #{adminJobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, assessment_department_flag = #{assessmentDepartmentFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, assessed_department_flag = #{assessedDepartmentFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, info_work_card = #{infoWorkCard,jdbcType=BIGINT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into kpi_department_tree( [year] ,[kpi_annual_id] ,[dept_id] ,[dept_name] ,[parent_id] ,[dept_level] ,[dept_sequence] ,[sequence] ,[ext_dept_id] ,[ext_department_id] ,[ext_team_id] ,[admin_job_id] ,[assessment_department_flag] ,[assessed_department_flag] ,[info_work_card] ,[attribute1] ,[attribute2] ,[attribute3] ,[attribute4] ,[attribute5] ,[create_time] ,[create_by] ,[update_time] ,[update_by] ) select #{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{kpiAnnualId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ,[id] ,[dept_name] ,REPLACE(parent_id,'70','1') ,[dept_level] ,[dept_sequence] ,[sequence] ,[ext_dept_id] ,[ext_department_id] ,[ext_team_id] ,[admin_job_id] ,0 ,1 ,#{infoWorkCard,jdbcType=BIGINT} ,#{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} ,#{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} ,#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} ,#{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} from fnd_dept fd where fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0
